blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,813 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
